meaning: 吉比恩(巴勒斯坦古都,位于耶路撒冷西北)
examples: Jeiel the father of Gibeon lived in Gibeon.
Joshua subdued them from Kadesh Barnea to Gaza and from the whole region of Goshen to Gibeon.
The LORD threw them into confusion before Israel, who defeated them in a great victory at Gibeon.
Gibeon meteorites that fell in Namibia thousands of years ago are smoother, refined by millennia of terrestrial erosion and often enhanced with a deep brown patina.
